tech_and_creation.core_trait: Pushes hardware and software far past their intended limits, driven by necessity and curiosity rather than access to premium tools.

current_projects.name: Vanta
current_projects.status: In active development, rebuilding from scratch with memory-first architecture
current_projects.notes: Full name: Versatile Adaptive Neural Trusted Assistant. Personality inspired by Raven (Teen Titans) — calm, loyal. Built primarily on Sketchware Pro and Acode.

current_projects.name: Nyumba
current_projects.type: Web-based student housing platform for Zambia
current_projects.notes: Mobile-first, dark-themed, Airbnb-style directory for off-campus housing near Zambian universities. Uses WhatsApp for contact handoff instead of in-app booking. Design system: Space Grotesk/Inter typography, navy + warm orange accents.

tech_and_creation.dev_environment: Builds primarily on a Tecno Pop 9 (budget device, 3-4GB RAM, Android Go edition) using Sketchware Pro and Acode. No access to a proper dev machine or PC (backup PC currently unstable, crashes and restarts on boot).
tech_and_creation.hardware_track_record: Runs demanding software on hardware never designed for it: GameCube emulation (Dolphin) for SA2B, Shadow the Hedgehog, Twilight Princess; open-world titles like Subnautica, Where Winds Meet; narrative titles like Life is Strange; platformers like Rain World. Regularly manages storage constraints via factory resets and SD card swaps.
tech_and_creation.current_goal: Saving toward a REDMAGIC 11 Pro; exploring a cheaper intermediate step (used REDMAGIC 8 Pro/8S Pro) as a nearer-term upgrade from the Pop 9.
tech_and_creation.exploring: AI agent development as a potential side-hustle/business niche, specifically interested in lightweight/on-device AI for low-resource hardware and WhatsApp-integrated tools — a natural extension of existing dev work.
tech_and_creation.video_editing: Also does independent video editing work.

creative_and_worldbuilding.notes: Wide-ranging creative mind, associative thinking style that branches across topics in unexpected but coherent ways. Often prefaces original ideas dismissively before developing them into sophisticated concepts.
past_projects: Saryū — Primordial Sand Dragon character with an associated cosmology (creator dragon Dante, Council of Gods)
"Presents" — mental-health-based power system with publicly visible status cards
creative_and_worldbuilding.music: Wrote original song lyrics including "Milu" (romantic) and "The Low Bar" (Irish pub folk style, incorporates ADHD themes).

interests.anime: Mid-rewatch of One Piece (low 200s, arc-chunked pacing). Plans to binge That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime S4. Developed an original theory connecting the "D." initial to devil/divine symbolism.
interests.gaming: Retro emulation, GameCube era, power-scaling debates (Dragon Ball vs Invincible, Aang vs Korra) — builds evidence-based arguments from canon feats.
interests.language_and_culture: Learning Irish and Japanese simultaneously, both via free tools. Exploring Irish mythology (Tuatha Dé Danann, Cú Chulainn, the Morrígan) and connecting it to worldbuilding interests.
interests.streaming: Planning a co-streaming setup on Twitch with a close friend (parallel Pokémon Platinum playthrough). Twitch Affiliate is a first milestone goal; streaming is a gradual way to work through being seen by others.

personal_context.communication_style: Casual, fast, associative, humor-forward, informal spelling. Prefers direct honest engagement over flattery.
personal_context.support_structure: One close friend who serves as a key support anchor.
personal_context.navigates: Social anxiety that limits conventional employment and in-person interaction.
personal_context.regulation_strategy: Uses creative work (music, worldbuilding, video editing) as an emotional regulation strategy.
